Function: FUN_00454960
Address: 0x454960


char * __cdecl FUN_00454960(char *param_1,char *param_2)

{
  char *pcVar1;
  char *pcVar2;
  
  pcVar1 = param_1;
  pcVar2 = param_2;
  while( true ) {
    if (*pcVar2 == '\0') {
      return param_1;
    }
    if (*pcVar1 == '\0') break;
    if (*pcVar2 == *pcVar1) {
      pcVar2 = pcVar2 + 1;
      pcVar1 = pcVar1 + 1;
    }
    else {
      param_1 = param_1 + 1;
      pcVar1 = param_1;
      pcVar2 = param_2;
    }
  }
  return (char *)0x0;
}
